revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:October 4 (old lunar calendar)]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of October 4 (old lunar calendar)]]</includeonly>

'''旧暦10月4日'''は[[旧暦]][[10月 (旧暦)|10月]]の4日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]]である。
== できごと == * [[舒明天皇]]4年（[[632年]]_月_日） - 第1回[[遣唐使]]が帰国 * [[文武天皇]]2年（[[698年]]_月_日） - 藤原京に天武天皇の発願による[[薬師寺]]が建立 * [[応安]]5年/[[文中]]元年（[[1372年]]_月_日） - 南朝が文中に改元 * [[宝永]]4年（[[1707年]]_月_日） - 遠州・紀州灘で大[[地震]]（[[宝永の大地震]]）。[[マグニチュード|M]]8.4で日本最大級の地震 * [[享保]]元年（[[1716年]]_月_日） - [[新井白石]]が自叙伝『折たく柴の記』を起筆 * [[明治]]5年（[[1872年]]_月_日） - 官営[[富岡製糸場]]が操業開始
== 誕生日 == * [[慶長]]12年（[[1607年]]_月_日） - [[徳川和子]]（東福門院）、[[後水尾天皇]]の中宮・[[徳川秀忠]]の子（+ [[1678年]]）
== 忌日 ==
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
{{msg:旧暦360日}} *前日[[10月3日 (旧暦)|10月3日]] 翌日[[10月5日 (旧暦)|10月5日]] - 前月[[9月4日 (旧暦)|9月4日]] 翌月[[11月4日 (旧暦)|11月4日]] *新暦[[10月4日]]
{{msg:stub}}

== 記念日・年中行事 ==

{{stub}}

{{旧暦10月}} '''旧暦10月4日'''（きゅうれきじゅうがつよっか）は[[10月 (旧暦)|旧暦10月]]の4日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]]である。
== できごと == * [[舒明天皇]]4年（[[ユリウス暦]][[632年]][[11月21日]]） - 第1回[[遣唐使]]が帰国 * [[文武天皇]]2年（ユリウス暦[[698年]][[11月12日]]） - [[藤原京]]に天武天皇の発願による[[薬師寺]]が建立 * [[応安]]5年/[[文中]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1372年]][[10月30日]]） - [[南朝 (日本)|南朝]]が[[建徳]]から文中に[[改元]] * [[宝永]]4年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1707年]][[10月28日]]） - [[遠江国|遠州]]・[[紀伊国|紀州]]灘で[[地震|大地震]]（[[宝永の大地震]]）。[[マグニチュード|M]]8.4で日本最大級の地震 * [[享保]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1716年]][[11月17日]]） - [[新井白石]]が自叙伝『折たく柴の記』を起筆 * [[明治]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1872年]][[11月4日]]） - 官営[[富岡製糸場]]が操業開始
== 誕生日 == * [[慶長]]12年（グレゴリオ暦[[1607年]][[11月23日]]） - [[徳川和子]]（東福門院）、[[後水尾天皇]]の中宮・[[徳川秀忠]]の子（+ [[1678年]]）
== 忌日 ==
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|10|3|10|5|9|4|11|10|1004}}

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing jawiki history before translation, of all the 12 lunar months
revision.text:
{{旧暦10月}} '''旧暦10月4日'''（きゅうれきじゅうがつよっか）は[[10月 (旧暦)|旧暦10月]]の4日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]]である。
== できごと == * [[舒明天皇]]4年（[[ユリウス暦]][[632年]][[11月21日]]） - 第1回[[遣唐使]]が帰国 * [[文武天皇]]2年（ユリウス暦[[698年]][[11月12日]]） - [[藤原京]]に天武天皇の発願による[[薬師寺]]が建立 * [[応安]]5年/[[文中]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1372年]][[10月30日]]） - [[南朝 (日本)|南朝]]が[[建徳]]から文中に[[改元]] * [[宝永]]4年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1707年]][[10月28日]]） - [[遠江国|遠州]]・[[紀伊国|紀州]]灘で[[地震|大地震]]（[[宝永の大地震]]）。[[マグニチュード|M]]8.4で日本最大級の地震 * [[享保]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1716年]][[11月17日]]） - [[新井白石]]が自叙伝『折たく柴の記』を起筆 * [[明治]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1872年]][[11月4日]]） - 官営[[富岡製糸場]]が操業開始
== 誕生日 == * [[慶長]]12年（グレゴリオ暦[[1607年]][[11月23日]]） - [[徳川和子]]（東福門院）、[[後水尾天皇]]の中宮・[[徳川秀忠]]の子（+ [[1678年]]）
== 忌日 ==
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|10|3|10|5|9|4|11|10|1004}}

== 誕生日 == * [[慶長]]12年（グレゴリオ暦[[1607年]][[11月23日]]） - [[徳川和子]]（東福門院）、[[後水尾天皇]]の中宮・[[徳川秀忠]]の子（+ [[1678年]]）
== 忌日 ==
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|10|3|10|5|9|4|11|10|1004}}

{{旧暦10月}} '''旧暦10月4日'''（きゅうれきじゅうがつよっか）は[[10月 (旧暦)|旧暦10月]]の4日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]]である。
== できごと == * [[舒明天皇]]4年（[[ユリウス暦]][[632年]][[11月21日]]） - 第1回[[遣唐使]]が帰国 * [[文武天皇]]2年（ユリウス暦[[698年]][[11月12日]]） - [[藤原京]]に天武天皇の発願による[[薬師寺]]が建立 * [[応安]]5年/[[文中]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1372年]][[10月30日]]） - [[南朝 (日本)|南朝]]が[[建徳]]から文中に[[改元]] * [[宝永]]4年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1707年]][[10月28日]]） - [[遠江国|遠州]]・[[紀伊国|紀州]]灘で[[地震|大地震]]（[[宝永の大地震]]）。[[マグニチュード|M]]8.4で日本最大級の地震 * [[享保]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1716年]][[11月17日]]） - [[新井白石]]が自叙伝『折たく柴の記』を起筆 * [[明治]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1872年]][[11月4日]]） - 官営[[富岡製糸場]]が操業開始
== 誕生日 == * [[慶長]]12年（グレゴリオ暦[[1607年]][[11月23日]]） - [[徳川和子]]（東福門院）、[[後水尾天皇]]の中宮・[[徳川秀忠]]の子（+ [[1678年]]）
== 忌日 ==
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|10|3|10|5|9|4|11|10|1004}}
[[Category:japanese lunar calendar]][[ja:10月4日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Japanese Lunar Calendar]]

{{Lunar October}} '''Lunar October4日'''（きゅうれきじゅうがつよっか）は[[10月 (旧暦)|Lunar October]]の4日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]]である。
== できごと == * [[舒明天皇]]4年（[[ユリウス暦]][[632年]][[11月21日]]） - 第1回[[遣唐使]]が帰国 * [[文武天皇]]2年（ユリウス暦[[698年]][[11月12日]]） - [[藤原京]]に天武天皇の発願による[[薬師寺]]が建立 * [[応安]]5年/[[文中]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1372年]][[10月30日]]） - [[南朝 (日本)|南朝]]が[[建徳]]から文中に[[改元]] * [[宝永]]4年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1707年]][[10月28日]]） - [[遠江国|遠州]]・[[紀伊国|紀州]]灘で[[地震|大地震]]（[[宝永の大地震]]）。[[マグニチュード|M]]8.4で日本最大級の地震 * [[享保]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1716年]][[11月17日]]） - [[新井白石]]が自叙伝『折たく柴の記』を起筆 * [[明治]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1872年]][[11月4日]]） - 官営[[富岡製糸場]]が操業開始
== 誕生日 == * [[慶長]]12年（グレゴリオ暦[[1607年]][[11月23日]]） - [[徳川和子]]（東福門院）、[[後水尾天皇]]の中宮・[[徳川秀忠]]の子（+ [[1678年]]）
== 忌日 ==
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|10|3|10|5|9|4|11|10|1004}}
[[Category:japanese lunar calendar]][[ja:10月4日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Japanese Lunar Calendar]]

revision.text:
{{Lunar October}} '''October 4 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the DAYX day of month {{ill|October (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}}.
<!--== {{Lunar October}} ''October 4 (Old Lunar Calendar)<!--Lunar October4-->きゅうれきじゅうがつよっか）は[[10月 (旧暦)|Lunar October]]の4日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]][[Category:先勝]]である。
--> == Events == * [[舒明天皇]]4年（[[ユリウス暦]][[632年]][[11月21日]]） - 第1回[[遣唐使]]が帰国 * [[文武天皇]]2年（ユリウス暦[[698年]][[11月12日]]） - [[藤原京]]に天武天皇の発願による[[薬師寺]]が建立 * [[応安]]5年/[[文中]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1372年]][[10月30日]]） - [[南朝 (日本)|南朝]]が[[建徳]]から文中に[[改元]] * [[宝永]]4年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1707年]][[10月28日]]） - [[遠江国|遠州]]・[[紀伊国|紀州]]灘で[[地震|大地震]]（[[宝永の大地震]]）。[[マグニチュード|M]]8.4で日本最大級の地震 * [[享保]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1716年]][[11月17日]]） - [[新井白石]]が自叙伝『折たく柴の記』を起筆 * [[明治]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1872年]][[11月4日]]） - 官営[[富岡製糸場]]が操業開始
== Births == * [[慶長]]12年（グレゴリオ暦[[1607年]][[11月23日]]） - [[徳川和子]]（東福門院）、[[後水尾天皇]]の中宮・[[徳川秀忠]]の子（+ [[1678年]]）
== Deaths ==
== Commemorations ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|10|3|10|5|9|4|11|10|1004}}
[[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[ja:10月4日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[Category:Lunar October]] {{citation needed}}
{{citation needed}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunar Months}} [[Category:先勝]] [[Category:not Butsumetsu]][[sn:October 4 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[Category:not Butsumetsu]] [[Category:month category-October 4 (Old Lunar Calendar)-month category]]

{{Lunar October}} '''October 4 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the DAYX day of month {{ill|October (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}}.
<!--== {{Lunar October}} ''October 4 (Old Lunar Calendar)<!--Lunar October4-->きゅうれきじゅうがつよっか）は[[10月 (旧暦)|Lunar October]]の4日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]][[Category:先勝]]である。
--> == Events == * [[舒明天皇]]4年（[[ユリウス暦]][[632年]][[11月21日]]） - 第1回[[遣唐使]]が帰国 * [[文武天皇]]2年（ユリウス暦[[698年]][[11月12日]]） - [[藤原京]]に天武天皇の発願による[[薬師寺]]が建立 * [[応安]]5年/[[文中]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1372年]][[10月30日]]） - [[南朝 (日本)|南朝]]が[[建徳]]から文中に[[改元]] * [[宝永]]4年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1707年]][[10月28日]]） - [[遠江国|遠州]]・[[紀伊国|紀州]]灘で[[地震|大地震]]（[[宝永の大地震]]）。[[マグニチュード|M]]8.4で日本最大級の地震 * [[享保]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1716年]][[11月17日]]） - [[新井白石]]が自叙伝『折たく柴の記』を起筆 * [[明治]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1872年]][[11月4日]]） - 官営[[富岡製糸場]]が操業開始
== Births == * [[慶長]]12年（グレゴリオ暦[[1607年]][[11月23日]]） - [[徳川和子]]（東福門院）、[[後水尾天皇]]の中宮・[[徳川秀忠]]の子（+ [[1678年]]）
== Deaths ==
== Commemorations ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|10|3|10|5|9|4|11|10|1004}}

<!--== {{Lunar October}} ''October 4 (Old Lunar Calendar)<!--Lunar October4-->きゅうれきじゅうがつよっか）は[[10月 (旧暦)|Lunar October]]の4日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]][[Category:先勝]]である。
--> == Events == * [[舒明天皇]]4年（[[ユリウス暦]][[632年]][[11月21日]]） - 第1回[[遣唐使]]が帰国 * [[文武天皇]]2年（ユリウス暦[[698年]][[11月12日]]） - [[藤原京]]に天武天皇の発願による[[薬師寺]]が建立 * [[応安]]5年/[[文中]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1372年]][[10月30日]]） - [[南朝 (日本)|南朝]]が[[建徳]]から文中に[[改元]] * [[宝永]]4年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1707年]][[10月28日]]） - [[遠江国|遠州]]・[[紀伊国|紀州]]灘で[[地震|大地震]]（[[宝永の大地震]]）。[[マグニチュード|M]]8.4で日本最大級の地震 * [[享保]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1716年]][[11月17日]]） - [[新井白石]]が自叙伝『折たく柴の記』を起筆 * [[明治]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1872年]][[11月4日]]） - 官営[[富岡製糸場]]が操業開始
== Births == * [[慶長]]12年（グレゴリオ暦[[1607年]][[11月23日]]） - [[徳川和子]]（東福門院）、[[後水尾天皇]]の中宮・[[徳川秀忠]]の子（+ [[1678年]]）
== Deaths ==
== Commemorations ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|10|3|10|5|9|4|11|10|1004}}

{{citation needed}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunar Months}} [[Category:先勝]] [[Category:not Butsumetsu]][[sn:October 4 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[Category:not Butsumetsu]] [[Category:Days 4 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:October 4 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:new pages]]

{{Lunar October}} '''October 4 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the 4th day of month {{ill|October (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}}.
<!--== {{Lunar October}} ''October 4 (Old Lunar Calendar)<!--Lunar October4れきじゅうがつよっか）は[[10月 (旧暦)|Lunar October]]の4日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]][[Category:先勝]]である。
--> == Events == * [[舒明天皇]]4年（[[ユリウス暦]][[632年]][[11月21日]]） - 第1回[[遣唐使]]が帰国 * [[文武天皇]]2年（ユリウス暦[[698年]][[11月12日]]） - [[藤原京]]に天武天皇の発願による[[薬師寺]]が建立 * [[応安]]5年/[[文中]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1372年]][[10月30日]]） - [[南朝 (日本)|南朝]]が[[建徳]]から文中に[[改元]] * [[宝永]]4年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1707年]][[10月28日]]） - [[遠江国|遠州]]・[[紀伊国|紀州]]灘で[[地震|大地震]]（[[宝永の大地震]]）。[[マグニチュード|M]]8.4で日本最大級の地震 * [[享保]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1716年]][[11月17日]]） - [[新井白石]]が自叙伝『折たく柴の記』を起筆 * [[明治]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1872年]][[11月4日]]） - 官営[[富岡製糸場]]が操業開始
== Births == * [[慶長]]12年（グレゴリオ暦[[1607年]][[11月23日]]） - [[徳川和子]]（東福門院）、[[後水尾天皇]]の中宮・[[徳川秀忠]]の子（+ [[1678年]]）
== Deaths ==
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{旧暦360日|10|3|10|5|9|4|11|10|1004}}

revision.text:
[[sn:October 4 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月4日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 4일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初四]] [[zh:十月初四]] [[en:draft:October 4 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar October}} '''October 4''' is the 4th day of month {{ill|October (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}}.
== Events ==
* {{ill|Emperor Jomei|ja|舒明天皇}} 4 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|632|ja|632年}} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日}}) – The first {{ill|Kentōshi|ja|遣唐使}} mission returns to Japan.
* {{ill|Emperor Monmu|ja|文武天皇}} 2 (Julian {{ill|698|ja|698年}} {{ill|November 12|ja|11月12日}}) – {{ill|Yakushi-ji|ja|薬師寺}}, founded by the will of {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|ja|天武天皇}}, is established in {{ill|Fujiwara-kyō|ja|藤原京}}.
* {{ill|Ōan (Japan)|ja|応安}} 5 / {{ill|Bunchū (Japan)|ja|文中}} 1 (Julian {{ill|1372|ja|1372年}} {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日}}) – The {{ill|Southern Court (Japan)|ja|南朝 (日本)}} changes the era name from {{ill|Kenchoku|ja|建徳}} to Bunchū.
* {{ill|Hōei (Japan)|ja|宝永}} 4 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1707|ja|1707年}} {{ill|October 28|ja|10月28日}}) – A major earthquake strikes {{ill|Tōtōmi Province|ja|遠江国}} and the {{ill|Kii Province|ja|紀伊国}} coast, known as the {{ill|Hōei earthquake|ja|宝永の大地震}}, with a magnitude of 8.4, making it one of Japan’s largest recorded earthquakes.
* {{ill|Kyōhō (era)|ja|享保}} 1 (Gregorian {{ill|1716|ja|1716年}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日}}) – {{ill|Arai Hakuseki|ja|新井白石}} begins writing his autobiography, *{{ill|Oridataku Shiba no Ki|ja|折たく柴の記}}*.
* {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1872|ja|1872年}} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日}}) – The government-run {{ill|Tomioka Silk Mill|ja|富岡製糸場}} begins operations.
== Births ==
* {{ill|Keichō (era)|ja|慶長}} 12 (Gregorian {{ill|1607|ja|1607年}} {{ill|November 23|ja|11月23日}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Masako|ja|徳川和子}} (known as {{ill|Tōfukumon-in|ja|東福門院}}), consort of {{ill|Emperor Go-Mizunoo|ja|後水尾天皇}} and daughter of {{ill|Tokugawa Hidetada|ja|徳川秀忠}} (+ {{ill|1678|ja|1678年}}).
== Deaths ==
[[Category:Japanese historical events]] [[Category:Edo period]] [[Category:Tokugawa shogunate]] [[Category:Earthquakes in Japan]] [[Category:Meiji period]] [[Category:Translated pages]] [[ja:11月の歴史的出来事]]

* {{ill|Ōan (Japan)|ja|応安}} 5 / {{ill|Bunchū (Japan)|ja|文中}} 1 (Julian {{ill|1372|ja|1372年}} {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日}}) – The {{ill|Southern Court (Japan)|ja|南朝 (日本)}} changes the era name from {{ill|Kenchoku|ja|建徳}} to Bunchū.
* {{ill|Hōei (Japan)|ja|宝永}} 4 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1707|ja|1707年}} {{ill|October 28|ja|10月28日}}) – A major earthquake strikes {{ill|Tōtōmi Province|ja|遠江国}} and the {{ill|Kii Province|ja|紀伊国}} coast, known as the {{ill|Hōei earthquake|ja|宝永の大地震}}, with a magnitude of 8.4, making it one of Japan’s largest recorded earthquakes.
* {{ill|Kyōhō (era)|ja|享保}} 1 (Gregorian {{ill|1716|ja|1716年}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日}}) – {{ill|Arai Hakuseki|ja|新井白石}} begins writing his autobiography, *{{ill|Oridataku Shiba no Ki|ja|折たく柴の記}}*.
* {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1872|ja|1872年}} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日}}) – The government-run {{ill|Tomioka Silk Mill|ja|富岡製糸場}} begins operations.
== Births ==
* {{ill|Keichō (era)|ja|慶長}} 12 (Gregorian {{ill|1607|ja|1607年}} {{ill|November 23|ja|11月23日}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Masako|ja|徳川和子}} (known as {{ill|Tōfukumon-in|ja|東福門院}}), consort of {{ill|Emperor Go-Mizunoo|ja|後水尾天皇}} and daughter of {{ill|Tokugawa Hidetada|ja|徳川秀忠}} (+ {{ill|1678|ja|1678年}}).

revision.text:
[[sn:October 4 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 10월 4일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月4日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 4일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初四]] [[zh:十月初四]] [[en:draft:October 4 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar October}} '''October 4''' is the 4th day of month {{ill|October (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}}.
== Events ==
* {{ill|Emperor Jomei|ja|舒明天皇}} 4 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|632|ja|632年}} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日}}) – The first {{ill|Kentōshi|ja|遣唐使}} mission returns to Japan.
* {{ill|Emperor Monmu|ja|文武天皇}} 2 (Julian {{ill|698|ja|698年}} {{ill|November 12|ja|11月12日}}) – {{ill|Yakushi-ji|ja|薬師寺}}, founded by the will of {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|ja|天武天皇}}, is established in {{ill|Fujiwara-kyō|ja|藤原京}}.
* {{ill|Ōan (Japan)|ja|応安}} 5 / {{ill|Bunchū (Japan)|ja|文中}} 1 (Julian {{ill|1372|ja|1372年}} {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日}}) – The {{ill|Southern Court (Japan)|ja|南朝 (日本)}} changes the era name from {{ill|Kenchoku|ja|建徳}} to Bunchū.
* {{ill|Hōei (Japan)|ja|宝永}} 4 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1707|ja|1707年}} {{ill|October 28|ja|10月28日}}) – A major earthquake strikes {{ill|Tōtōmi Province|ja|遠江国}} and the {{ill|Kii Province|ja|紀伊国}} coast, known as the {{ill|Hōei earthquake|ja|宝永の大地震}}, with a magnitude of 8.4, making it one of Japan’s largest recorded earthquakes.
* {{ill|Kyōhō (era)|ja|享保}} 1 (Gregorian {{ill|1716|ja|1716年}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日}}) – {{ill|Arai Hakuseki|ja|新井白石}} begins writing his autobiography, *{{ill|Oridataku Shiba no Ki|ja|折たく柴の記}}*.
* {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1872|ja|1872年}} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日}}) – The government-run {{ill|Tomioka Silk Mill|ja|富岡製糸場}} begins operations.
== Births ==
* {{ill|Keichō (era)|ja|慶長}} 12 (Gregorian {{ill|1607|ja|1607年}} {{ill|November 23|ja|11月23日}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Masako|ja|徳川和子}} (known as {{ill|Tōfukumon-in|ja|東福門院}}), consort of {{ill|Emperor Go-Mizunoo|ja|後水尾天皇}} and daughter of {{ill|Tokugawa Hidetada|ja|徳川秀忠}} (+ {{ill|1678|ja|1678年}}).
== Deaths ==

* {{ill|Hōei (Japan)|ja|宝永}} 4 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1707|ja|1707年}} {{ill|October 28|ja|10月28日}}) – A major earthquake strikes {{ill|Tōtōmi Province|ja|遠江国}} and the {{ill|Kii Province|ja|紀伊国}} coast, known as the {{ill|Hōei earthquake|ja|宝永の大地震}}, with a magnitude of 8.4, making it one of Japan’s largest recorded earthquakes.
* {{ill|Kyōhō (era)|ja|享保}} 1 (Gregorian {{ill|1716|ja|1716年}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日}}) – {{ill|Arai Hakuseki|ja|新井白石}} begins writing his autobiography, *{{ill|Oridataku Shiba no Ki|ja|折たく柴の記}}*.
* {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1872|ja|1872年}} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日}}) – The government-run {{ill|Tomioka Silk Mill|ja|富岡製糸場}} begins operations.

[[sn:October 4 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 10월 4일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月4日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 4일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初四]] [[zh:十月初四]] [[en:draft:October 4 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar October}} '''October 4''' is the 4th day of month {{ill|October (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Emperor Jomei|ja|舒明天皇}} 4 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|632|ja|632年}} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日}}) – The first {{ill|Kentōshi|ja|遣唐使}} mission returns to Japan. * {{ill|Emperor Monmu|ja|文武天皇}} 2 (Julian {{ill|698|ja|698年}} {{ill|November 12|ja|11月12日}}) – {{ill|Yakushi-ji|ja|薬師寺}}, founded by the will of {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|ja|天武天皇}}, is established in {{ill|Fujiwara-kyō|ja|藤原京}}. * {{ill|Ōan (Japan)|ja|応安}} 5 / {{ill|Bunchū (Japan)|ja|文中}} 1 (Julian {{ill|1372|ja|1372年}} {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日}}) – The {{ill|Southern Court (Japan)|ja|南朝 (日本)}} changes the era name from {{ill|Kenchoku|ja|建徳}} to Bunchū. * {{ill|Hōei (Japan)|ja|宝永}} 4 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1707|ja|1707年}} {{ill|October 28|ja|10月28日}}) – A major earthquake strikes {{ill|Tōtōmi Province|ja|遠江国}} and the {{ill|Kii Province|ja|紀伊国}} coast, known as the {{ill|Hōei earthquake|ja|宝永の大地震}}, with a magnitude of 8.4, making it one of Japan’s largest recorded earthquakes. * {{ill|Kyōhō (era)|ja|享保}} 1 (Gregorian {{ill|1716|ja|1716年}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日}}) – {{ill|Arai Hakuseki|ja|新井白石}} begins writing his autobiography, *{{ill|Oridataku Shiba no Ki|ja|折たく柴の記}}*. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1872|ja|1872年}} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日}}) – The government-run {{ill|Tomioka Silk Mill|ja|富岡製糸場}} begins operations.
== Births == * {{ill|Keichō (era)|ja|慶長}} 12 (Gregorian {{ill|1607|ja|1607年}} {{ill|November 23|ja|11月23日}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Masako|ja|徳川和子}} (known as {{ill|Tōfukumon-in|ja|東福門院}}), consort of {{ill|Emperor Go-Mizunoo|ja|後水尾天皇}} and daughter of {{ill|Tokugawa Hidetada|ja|徳川秀忠}} (+ {{ill|1678|ja|1678年}}).
== Deaths == [[Category:Japanese historical events]] [[Category:Edo period]] [[Category:Tokugawa shogunate]] [[Category:Earthquakes in Japan]] [[Category:Meiji period]] [[Category:Translated pages]] [[ja:11月の歴史的出来事]]

[[sn:October 4 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 4일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月4日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 4일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初四]] [[zh:十月初四]] [[en:draft:October 4 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 4''' is the 4th day of month {{ill|October (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Emperor Jomei|ja|舒明天皇}} 4 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|632|ja|632年}} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日}} ) – The first {{ill|Kentōshi|ja|遣唐使}} mission returns to Japan. * {{ill|Emperor Monmu|ja|文武天皇}} 2 (Julian {{ill|698|ja|698年}} {{ill|November 12|ja|11月12日}} ) – {{ill|Yakushi-ji|ja|薬師寺}} , founded by the will of {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|ja|天武天皇}} , is established in {{ill|Fujiwara-kyō|ja|藤原京}} . * {{ill|Ōan (Japan)|ja|応安}} 5 / {{ill|Bunchū (Japan)|ja|文中}} 1 (Julian {{ill|1372|ja|1372年}} {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日}} ) – The {{ill|Southern Court (Japan)|ja|南朝 (日本)}} changes the era name from {{ill|Kenchoku|ja|建徳}} to Bunchū. * {{ill|Hōei (Japan)|ja|宝永}} 4 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1707|ja|1707年}} {{ill|October 28|ja|10月28日}} ) – A major earthquake strikes {{ill|Tōtōmi Province|ja|遠江国}} and the {{ill|Kii Province|ja|紀伊国}} coast, known as the {{ill|Hōei earthquake|ja|宝永の大地震}} , with a magnitude of 8.4, making it one of Japan’s largest recorded earthquakes. * {{ill|Kyōhō (era)|ja|享保}} 1 (Gregorian {{ill|1716|ja|1716年}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日}} ) – {{ill|Arai Hakuseki|ja|新井白石}} begins writing his autobiography, *{{ill|Oridataku Shiba no Ki|ja|折たく柴の記}} *. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1872|ja|1872年}} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日}} ) – The government-run {{ill|Tomioka Silk Mill|ja|富岡製糸場}} begins operations.
== Births == * {{ill|Keichō (era)|ja|Keichō}} 12 (Gregorian {{ill|1607|ja|1607年}} {{ill|November 23|ja|11月23日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Masako|ja|徳川和子}} (known as {{ill|Tōfukumon-in|ja|東福門院}} ), consort of {{ill|Emperor Go-Mizunoo|ja|後水尾天皇}} and daughter of {{ill|Tokugawa Hidetada|ja|徳川秀忠}} (+ {{ill|1678|ja|1678年}} ).
== Deaths == [[Category:Japanese historical events]] [[Category:Edo period]] [[Category:Tokugawa shogunate]] [[Category:Earthquakes in Japan]] [[Category:Meiji period]] [[Category:Translated pages]] [[ja:11月の歴史的出来事]]

[[Category:Senshō]] [[Category:not Butsumetsu]] [[sn:October 4 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 4일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月4日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 4일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初四]] [[zh:十月初四]] [[en:draft:October 4 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[Category:not Butsumetsu]] [[Category:Days 4 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[sn:October 4 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 4일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月4日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 4일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初四]] [[zh:十月初四]] [[en:draft:October 4 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[Category:null category]] [[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] [[Category: Lunar Calendar Days]] [[Category:qq]] [[sn:October 4 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:Lunar_Calendar_Days]] [[sn:October 4 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[Category:Lunar_Calendar_Days]] [[Category:qq]] [[sn:October 4 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]] [[sn:October 4 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[Category:qq]] [[sn:October 4 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 4일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月4日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 4일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初四]] [[zh:十月初四]] [[en:draft:October 4 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] ==References== {{reflist}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunar Months}} [[Category:completion tier 5]] [[Category:qq]] [[sn:October 4 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:Lunisolar]] [[Category:Lunisolar]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:October 4 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[Category:qq]]

[[sn:October 4 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 4일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月4日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 4일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初四]] [[zh:十月初四]] [[en:draft:October 4 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 4''' is the 4th day of month {{ill|October (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Emperor Jomei|ja|舒明天皇}} 4 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|632|ja|632年}} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日}} ) – The first {{ill|Kentōshi|ja|遣唐使}} mission returns to Japan. * {{ill|Emperor Monmu|ja|文武天皇}} 2 (Julian {{ill|698|ja|698年}} {{ill|November 12|ja|11月12日}} ) – {{ill|Yakushi-ji|ja|薬師寺}} , founded by the will of {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|ja|天武天皇}} , is established in {{ill|Fujiwara-kyō|ja|藤原京}} . * {{ill|Ōan (Japan)|ja|応安}} 5 / {{ill|Bunchū (Japan)|ja|文中}} 1 (Julian {{ill|1372|ja|1372年}} {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日}} ) – The {{ill|Southern Court (Japan)|ja|南朝 (日本)}} changes the era name from {{ill|Kenchoku|ja|建徳}} to Bunchū. * {{ill|Hōei (Japan)|ja|宝永}} 4 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1707|ja|1707年}} {{ill|October 28|ja|10月28日}} ) – A major earthquake strikes {{ill|Tōtōmi Province|ja|遠江国}} and the {{ill|Kii Province|ja|紀伊国}} coast, known as the {{ill|Hōei earthquake|ja|宝永の大地震}} , with a magnitude of 8.4, making it one of Japan’s largest recorded earthquakes. * {{ill|Kyōhō (era)|ja|享保}} 1 (Gregorian {{ill|1716|ja|1716年}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日}} ) – {{ill|Arai Hakuseki|ja|新井白石}} begins writing his autobiography, *{{ill|Oridataku Shiba no Ki|ja|折たく柴の記}} *. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1872|ja|1872年}} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日}} ) – The government-run {{ill|Tomioka Silk Mill|ja|富岡製糸場}} begins operations.
== Births == * {{ill|Keichō (era)|ja|Keichō}} 12 (Gregorian {{ill|1607|ja|1607年}} {{ill|November 23|ja|11月23日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Masako|ja|徳川和子}} (known as {{ill|Tōfukumon-in|ja|東福門院}} ), consort of {{ill|Emperor Go-Mizunoo|ja|後水尾天皇}} and daughter of {{ill|Tokugawa Hidetada|ja|徳川秀忠}} (+ {{ill|1678|ja|1678年}} ).
== Deaths == [[Category:Japanese historical events]] [[Category:Edo period]] [[Category:Tokugawa shogunate]] [[Category:Earthquakes in Japan]] [[Category:Meiji period]] [[Category:Translated pages]] [[ja:11月の歴史的出来事]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Lunisolar}}" to "{{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}}"
revision.text:
[[sn:October 4 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 4일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月4日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 4일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初四]] [[zh:十月初四]] [[en:draft:October 4 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 4''' is the 4th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Emperor Jomei|ja|舒明天皇}} 4 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|632|ja|632年}} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日}} ) – The first {{ill|Kentōshi|ja|遣唐使}} mission returns to Japan. * {{ill|Emperor Monmu|ja|文武天皇}} 2 (Julian {{ill|698|ja|698年}} {{ill|November 12|ja|11月12日}} ) – {{ill|Yakushi-ji|ja|薬師寺}} , founded by the will of {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|ja|天武天皇}} , is established in {{ill|Fujiwara-kyō|ja|藤原京}} . * {{ill|Ōan (Japan)|ja|応安}} 5 / {{ill|Bunchū (Japan)|ja|文中}} 1 (Julian {{ill|1372|ja|1372年}} {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日}} ) – The {{ill|Southern Court (Japan)|ja|南朝 (日本)}} changes the era name from {{ill|Kenchoku|ja|建徳}} to Bunchū. * {{ill|Hōei (Japan)|ja|宝永}} 4 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1707|ja|1707年}} {{ill|October 28|ja|10月28日}} ) – A major earthquake strikes {{ill|Tōtōmi Province|ja|遠江国}} and the {{ill|Kii Province|ja|紀伊国}} coast, known as the {{ill|Hōei earthquake|ja|宝永の大地震}} , with a magnitude of 8.4, making it one of Japan’s largest recorded earthquakes. * {{ill|Kyōhō (era)|ja|享保}} 1 (Gregorian {{ill|1716|ja|1716年}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日}} ) – {{ill|Arai Hakuseki|ja|新井白石}} begins writing his autobiography, *{{ill|Oridataku Shiba no Ki|ja|折たく柴の記}} *. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1872|ja|1872年}} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日}} ) – The government-run {{ill|Tomioka Silk Mill|ja|富岡製糸場}} begins operations.
== Births == * {{ill|Keichō (era)|ja|Keichō}} 12 (Gregorian {{ill|1607|ja|1607年}} {{ill|November 23|ja|11月23日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Masako|ja|徳川和子}} (known as {{ill|Tōfukumon-in|ja|東福門院}} ), consort of {{ill|Emperor Go-Mizunoo|ja|後水尾天皇}} and daughter of {{ill|Tokugawa Hidetada|ja|徳川秀忠}} (+ {{ill|1678|ja|1678年}} ).
== Deaths == [[Category:Japanese historical events]] [[Category:Edo period]] [[Category:Tokugawa shogunate]] [[Category:Earthquakes in Japan]] [[Category:Meiji period]] [[Category:Translated pages]] [[ja:11月の歴史的出来事]]
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|3|10|5|9|4|11|10|1004}}

== Deaths == [[Category:Japanese historical events]] [[Category:Edo period]] [[Category:Tokugawa shogunate]] [[Category:Earthquakes in Japan]] [[Category:Meiji period]] [[Category:Translated pages]] [[ja:11月の歴史的出来事]]

[[sn:October 4 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 4일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月4日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 4일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初四]] [[zh:十月初四]] [[en:draft:October 4 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 4''' is the 4th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Emperor Jomei|ja|舒明天皇}} 4 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|632|ja|632年}} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日}} ) – The first {{ill|Kentōshi|ja|遣唐使}} mission returns to Japan. * {{ill|Emperor Monmu|ja|文武天皇}} 2 (Julian {{ill|698|ja|698年}} {{ill|November 12|ja|11月12日}} ) – {{ill|Yakushi-ji|ja|薬師寺}} , founded by the will of {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|ja|天武天皇}} , is established in {{ill|Fujiwara-kyō|ja|藤原京}} . * {{ill|Ōan (Japan)|ja|応安}} 5 / {{ill|Bunchū (Japan)|ja|文中}} 1 (Julian {{ill|1372|ja|1372年}} {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日}} ) – The {{ill|Southern Court (Japan)|ja|南朝 (日本)}} changes the era name from {{ill|Kenchoku|ja|建徳}} to Bunchū. * {{ill|Hōei (Japan)|ja|宝永}} 4 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1707|ja|1707年}} {{ill|October 28|ja|10月28日}} ) – A major earthquake strikes {{ill|Tōtōmi Province|ja|遠江国}} and the {{ill|Kii Province|ja|紀伊国}} coast, known as the {{ill|Hōei earthquake|ja|宝永の大地震}} , with a magnitude of 8.4, making it one of Japan’s largest recorded earthquakes. * {{ill|Kyōhō (era)|ja|享保}} 1 (Gregorian {{ill|1716|ja|1716年}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日}} ) – {{ill|Arai Hakuseki|ja|新井白石}} begins writing his autobiography, *{{ill|Oridataku Shiba no Ki|ja|折たく柴の記}} *. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1872|ja|1872年}} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日}} ) – The government-run {{ill|Tomioka Silk Mill|ja|富岡製糸場}} begins operations.
== Births == * {{ill|Keichō (era)|ja|Keichō}} 12 (Gregorian {{ill|1607|ja|1607年}} {{ill|November 23|ja|11月23日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Masako|ja|徳川和子}} (known as {{ill|Tōfukumon-in|ja|東福門院}} ), consort of {{ill|Emperor Go-Mizunoo|ja|後水尾天皇}} and daughter of {{ill|Tokugawa Hidetada|ja|徳川秀忠}} (+ {{ill|1678|ja|1678年}} ).

[[sn:October 4 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 4일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月4日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 4일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初四]] [[zh:十月初四]] [[en:draft:October 4 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 4''' is the 4th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Emperor Jomei|ja|舒明天皇}} 4 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|632|ja|632年}} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日}} ) – The first {{ill|Kentōshi|ja|遣唐使}} mission returns to Japan. * {{ill|Emperor Monmu|ja|文武天皇}} 2 (Julian {{ill|698|ja|698年}} {{ill|November 12|ja|11月12日}} ) – {{ill|Yakushi-ji|ja|薬師寺}} , founded by the will of {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|ja|天武天皇|1=Emperor Tenmu}} , is established in {{ill|Fujiwara-kyō|ja|藤原京}} . * {{ill|Ōan (Japan)|ja|応安}} 5 / {{ill|Bunchū (Japan)|ja|文中}} 1 (Julian {{ill|1372|ja|1372年}} {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日}} ) – The {{ill|Southern Court (Japan)|ja|南朝 (日本)}} changes the era name from {{ill|Kenchoku|ja|建徳}} to Bunchū. * {{ill|Hōei (Japan)|ja|宝永}} 4 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1707|ja|1707年}} {{ill|October 28|ja|10月28日}} ) – A major earthquake strikes {{ill|Tōtōmi Province|ja|遠江国}} and the {{ill|Kii Province|ja|紀伊国}} coast, known as the {{ill|Hōei earthquake|ja|宝永の大地震}} , with a magnitude of 8.4, making it one of Japan’s largest recorded earthquakes. * {{ill|Kyōhō (era)|ja|享保}} 1 (Gregorian {{ill|1716|ja|1716年}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日}} ) – {{ill|Arai Hakuseki|ja|新井白石}} begins writing his autobiography, *{{ill|Oridataku Shiba no Ki|ja|折たく柴の記}} *. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1872|ja|1872年}} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日}} ) – The government-run {{ill|Tomioka Silk Mill|ja|富岡製糸場}} begins operations.
== Births == * {{ill|Keichō (era)|ja|Keichō}} 12 (Gregorian {{ill|1607|ja|1607年}} {{ill|November 23|ja|11月23日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Masako|ja|徳川和子}} (known as {{ill|Tōfukumon-in|ja|東福門院}} ), consort of {{ill|Emperor Go-Mizunoo|ja|後水尾天皇}} and daughter of {{ill|Tokugawa Hidetada|ja|徳川秀忠}} (+ {{ill|1678|ja|1678年}} ).
== Deaths == [[Category:Japanese historical events]] [[Category:Edo period]] [[Category:Tokugawa shogunate]] [[Category:Earthquakes in Japan]] [[Category:Meiji period]] [[ja:11月の歴史的出来事]]
== See Also ==

[[sn:October 4 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 4일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月4日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 4일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初四]] [[zh:十月初四]] [[en:draft:October 4 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 4''' is the 4th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Emperor Jomei|ja|舒明天皇}} 4 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|632|ja|632年}} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日}} ) – The first {{ill|Kentōshi|ja|Kentōshi (envoy to Tang China)}} mission returns to Japan. * {{ill|Emperor Monmu|ja|文武天皇}} 2 (Julian {{ill|698|ja|698年}} {{ill|November 12|ja|11月12日}} ) – {{ill|Yakushi-ji|ja|薬師寺}} , founded by the will of {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu}} , is established in {{ill|Fujiwara-kyō|ja|藤原京}} . * {{ill|Ōan (Japan)|ja|応安}} 5 / {{ill|Bunchū (Japan)|ja|文中}} 1 (Julian {{ill|1372|ja|1372年}} {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日}} ) – The {{ill|Southern Court (Japan)|ja|南朝 (日本)}} changes the era name from {{ill|Kenchoku|ja|建徳}} to Bunchū. * {{ill|Hōei (Japan)|ja|宝永}} 4 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1707|ja|1707年}} {{ill|October 28|ja|10月28日}} ) – A major earthquake strikes {{ill|Tōtōmi Province|ja|遠江国}} and the {{ill|Kii Province|ja|紀伊国}} coast, known as the {{ill|Hōei earthquake|ja|宝永の大Earthquake}} , with a magnitude of 8.4, making it one of Japan’s largest recorded earthquakes. * {{ill|Kyōhō (era)|ja|享保}} 1 (Gregorian {{ill|1716|ja|1716年}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日}} ) – {{ill|Arai Hakuseki|ja|新井白石}} begins writing his autobiography, *{{ill|Oridataku Shiba no Ki|ja|折たく柴の記}} *. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1872|ja|1872年}} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日}} ) – The government-run {{ill|Tomioka Silk Mill|ja|富岡製糸場}} begins operations.
== Births == * {{ill|Keichō (era)|ja|Keichō}} 12 (Gregorian {{ill|1607|ja|1607年}} {{ill|November 23|ja|11月23日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Masako|ja|徳川和子}} (known as {{ill|Tōfukumon-in|ja|東福門院}} ), consort of {{ill|Emperor Go-Mizunoo|ja|後水尾天皇}} and daughter of {{ill|Tokugawa Hidetada|ja|徳川秀忠}} (+ {{ill|1678|ja|1678年}} ).
== Deaths == [[Category:Japanese historical events]] [[Category:Edo period]] [[Category:Tokugawa shogunate]] [[Category:Earthquakes in Japan]] [[Category:Meiji period]] [[ja:11月の歴史的出来事]]
== See Also ==

== Deaths == [[Category:Japanese historical events]] [[Category:Edo period]] [[Category:Tokugawa shogunate]] [[Category:Earthquakes in Japan]] [[Category:Meiji period]] [[ja:11月の歴史的出来事]] == See Also! ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|3|10|5|9|4|11|10|1004}}

[[sn:October 4 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 4일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月4日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 4일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初四]] [[zh:十月初四]] [[en:draft:October 4 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 4''' is the 4th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .

== Births == * {{ill|Keichō (era)|ja|Keichō}} 12 (Gregorian {{ill|1607|ja|1607年}} {{ill|November 23|ja|11月23日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Masako|ja|徳川和子}} (known as {{ill|Tōfukumon-in|ja|東福門院}} ), consort of {{ill|Emperor Go-Mizunoo|ja|後水尾天皇}} and daughter of {{ill|Tokugawa Hidetada|ja|徳川秀忠}} (+ {{ill|1678|ja|1678年}} ).

[[sn:October 4 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 4일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月4日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 4일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初四]] [[zh:十月初四]] [[en:draft:October 4 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 4''' is the 4th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Emperor Jomei|ja|舒明天皇}} 4 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|632|ja|632nd year }} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日}} ) – The first {{ill|Kentōshi|ja|Kentōshi (envoy to Tang China)}} mission returns to Japan. * {{ill|Emperor Monmu|ja|文武天皇}} 2 (Julian {{ill|698|ja|698th year }} {{ill|November 12|ja|11月12日}} ) – {{ill|Yakushi-ji|ja|薬師寺}} , founded by the will of {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu}} , is established in {{ill|Fujiwara-kyō|ja|藤原京}} . * {{ill|Ōan (Japan)|ja|応安}} 5 / {{ill|Bunchū (Japan)|ja|文中}} 1 (Julian {{ill|1372|ja|1372nd year }} {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日}} ) – The {{ill|Southern Court (Japan)|ja|南朝 (日本)}} changes the era name from {{ill|Kenchoku|ja|建徳}} to Bunchū. * {{ill|Hōei (Japan)|ja|宝永}} 4 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1707|ja|1707th year }} {{ill|October 28|ja|10月28日}} ) – A major earthquake strikes {{ill|Tōtōmi Province|ja|遠江国}} and the {{ill|Kii Province|ja|紀伊国}} coast, known as the {{ill|Hōei earthquake|ja|宝永の大Earthquake}} , with a magnitude of 8.4, making it one of Japan’s largest recorded earthquakes. * {{ill|Kyōhō (era)|ja|享保}} 1 (Gregorian {{ill|1716|ja|1716年}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日}} ) – {{ill|Arai Hakuseki|ja|新井白石}} begins writing his autobiography, *{{ill|Oridataku Shiba no Ki|ja|折たく柴の記}} *. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1872|ja|1872nd year }} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日}} ) – The government-run {{ill|Tomioka Silk Mill|ja|富岡製糸場}} begins operations.
== Births == * {{ill|Keichō (era)|ja|Keichō}} 12 (Gregorian {{ill|1607|ja|1607th year }} {{ill|November 23|ja|11月23日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Masako|ja|徳川和子}} (known as {{ill|Tōfukumon-in|ja|東福門院}} ), consort of {{ill|Emperor Go-Mizunoo|ja|後水尾天皇}} and daughter of {{ill|Tokugawa Hidetada|ja|徳川秀忠}} (+ {{ill|1678|ja|1678th year }} ).

[[sn:October 4 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 4일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月4日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 4일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初四]] [[zh:十月初四]] [[en:draft:October 4 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 4''' is the 4th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Emperor Jomei|ja|舒明天皇}} 4 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|632|ja|632nd year }} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日}} ) – The first {{ill|Kentōshi|ja|Kentōshi (envoy to Tang China)}} mission returns to Japan. * {{ill|Emperor Monmu|ja|文武天皇}} 2 (Julian {{ill|698|ja|698th year }} {{ill|November 12|ja|11月12日}} ) – {{ill|Yakushi-ji|ja|薬師寺}} , founded by the will of {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu}} , is established in {{ill|Fujiwara-kyō|ja|藤原京}} . * {{ill|Ōan (Japan)|ja|応安}} 5 / {{ill|Bunchū (Japan)|ja|文中}} 1 (Julian {{ill|1372|ja|1372nd year }} {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日}} ) – The {{ill|Southern Court (Japan)|ja|南朝 (日本)}} changes the era name from {{ill|Kenchoku|ja|建徳}} to Bunchū. * {{ill|Hōei (Japan)|ja|宝永}} 4 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1707|ja|1707th year }} {{ill|October 28|ja|10月28日}} ) – A major earthquake strikes {{ill|Tōtōmi Province|ja|遠江国}} and the {{ill|Kii Province|ja|紀伊国}} coast, known as the {{ill|Hōei earthquake|ja|宝永の大Earthquake}} , with a magnitude of 8.4, making it one of Japan’s largest recorded earthquakes. * {{ill|Kyōhō (era)|ja|享保}} 1 (Gregorian {{ill|1716|ja|1716th year }} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日}} ) – {{ill|Arai Hakuseki|ja|新井白石}} begins writing his autobiography, *{{ill|Oridataku Shiba no Ki|ja|折たく柴の記}} *. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1872|ja|1872nd year }} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日}} ) – The government-run {{ill|Tomioka Silk Mill|ja|富岡製糸場}} begins operations.
== Births == * {{ill|Keichō (era)|ja|Keichō}} 12 (Gregorian {{ill|1607|ja|1607th year }} {{ill|November 23|ja|11月23日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Masako|ja|徳川和子}} (known as {{ill|Tōfukumon-in|ja|東福門院}} ), consort of {{ill|Emperor Go-Mizunoo|ja|後水尾天皇}} and daughter of {{ill|Tokugawa Hidetada|ja|徳川秀忠}} (+ {{ill|1678|ja|1678th year }} ).

== Births == * {{ill|Keichō (era)|ja|Keichō}} 12 (Gregorian {{ill|1607|ja|1607th year }} {{ill|November 23|ja|11月23日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Masako|ja|徳川和子}} (known as {{ill|Tōfukumon-in|ja|東福門院}} ), consort of {{ill|Emperor Go-Mizunoo|ja|後水尾天皇}} and daughter of {{ill|Tokugawa Hidetada|ja|徳川秀忠}} (+ {{ill|1678|ja|1678th year }} ).

revision.comment: Copying from [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] to [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
[[sn:October 4 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 4일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月4日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 4일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初四]] [[zh:十月初四]] [[en:draft:October 4 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 4''' is the 4th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Emperor Jomei|ja|舒明天皇}} 4 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|632|ja|632nd year }} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日}} ) – The first {{ill|Kentōshi|ja|Kentōshi (envoy to Tang China)}} mission returns to Japan. * {{ill|Emperor Monmu|ja|文武天皇}} 2 (Julian {{ill|698|ja|698th year }} {{ill|November 12|ja|11月12日}} ) – {{ill|Yakushi-ji|ja|薬師寺}} , founded by the will of {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu}} , is established in {{ill|Fujiwara-kyō|ja|藤原京}} . * {{ill|Ōan (Japan)|ja|応安}} 5 / {{ill|Bunchū (Japan)|ja|文中}} 1 (Julian {{ill|1372|ja|1372nd year }} {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日}} ) – The {{ill|Southern Court (Japan)|ja|南朝 (日本)}} changes the era name from {{ill|Kenchoku|ja|建徳}} to Bunchū. * {{ill|Hōei (Japan)|ja|宝永}} 4 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1707|ja|1707th year }} {{ill|October 28|ja|10月28日}} ) – A major earthquake strikes {{ill|Tōtōmi Province|ja|遠江国}} and the {{ill|Kii Province|ja|紀伊国}} coast, known as the {{ill|Hōei earthquake|ja|宝永の大Earthquake}} , with a magnitude of 8.4, making it one of Japan’s largest recorded earthquakes. * {{ill|Kyōhō (era)|ja|享保}} 1 (Gregorian {{ill|1716|ja|1716th year }} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日}} ) – {{ill|Arai Hakuseki|ja|新井白石}} begins writing his autobiography, *{{ill|Oridataku Shiba no Ki|ja|折たく柴の記}} *. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1872|ja|1872nd year }} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日}} ) – The government-run {{ill|Tomioka Silk Mill|ja|富岡製糸場}} begins operations.
== Births == * {{ill|Keichō (era)|ja|Keichō}} 12 (Gregorian {{ill|1607|ja|1607th year }} {{ill|November 23|ja|11月23日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Masako|ja|徳川和子}} (known as {{ill|Tōfukumon-in|ja|東福門院}} ), consort of {{ill|Emperor Go-Mizunoo|ja|後水尾天皇}} and daughter of {{ill|Tokugawa Hidetada|ja|徳川秀忠}} (+ {{ill|1678|ja|1678th year }} ).
== Deaths == [[Category:Japanese historical events]] [[Category:Edo period]] [[Category:Tokugawa shogunate]] [[Category:Earthquakes in Japan]] [[Category:Meiji period]] [[ja:11月の歴史的出来事]]
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|3|10|5|9|4|11|10|1004}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Emperor Jomei|ja|舒明天皇}} 4 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|632|ja|632nd year }} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日}} ) – The first {{ill|Kentōshi|ja|Kentōshi (envoy to Tang China)}} mission returns to Japan. * {{ill|Emperor Monmu|ja|文武天皇}} 2 (Julian {{ill|698|ja|698th year }} {{ill|November 12|ja|11月12日}} ) – {{ill|Yakushi-ji|ja|薬師寺}} , founded by the will of {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu}} , is established in {{ill|Fujiwara-kyō|ja|藤原京}} . * {{ill|Ōan (Japan)|ja|応安}} 5 / {{ill|Bunchū (Japan)|ja|文中}} 1 (Julian {{ill|1372|ja|1372nd year }} {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日}} ) – The {{ill|Southern Court (Japan)|ja|南朝 (日本)}} changes the era name from {{ill|Kenchoku|ja|建徳}} to Bunchū. * {{ill|Hōei (Japan)|ja|宝永}} 4 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1707|ja|1707th year }} {{ill|October 28|ja|10月28日}} ) – A major earthquake strikes {{ill|Tōtōmi Province|ja|遠江国}} and the {{ill|Kii Province|ja|紀伊国}} coast, known as the {{ill|Hōei earthquake|ja|宝永の大Earthquake}} , with a magnitude of 8.4, making it one of Japan’s largest recorded earthquakes. * {{ill|Kyōhō (era)|ja|享保}} 1 (Gregorian {{ill|1716|ja|1716th year }} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日}} ) – {{ill|Arai Hakuseki|ja|新井白石}} begins writing his autobiography, *{{ill|Oridataku Shiba no Ki|ja|折たく柴の記}} *. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1872|ja|1872nd year }} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日}} ) – The government-run {{ill|Tomioka Silk Mill|ja|富岡製糸場}} begins operations.
== Births == * {{ill|Keichō (era)|ja|Keichō}} 12 (Gregorian {{ill|1607|ja|1607th year }} {{ill|November 23|ja|11月23日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Masako|ja|徳川和子}} (known as {{ill|Tōfukumon-in|ja|東福門院}} ), consort of {{ill|Emperor Go-Mizunoo|ja|後水尾天皇}} and daughter of {{ill|Tokugawa Hidetada|ja|徳川秀忠}} (+ {{ill|1678|ja|1678th year }} ).

[[cdo:10 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初四]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 4''' is the 4th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki|12=draft}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝|12=draft}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Emperor Jomei|ja|舒明天皇|12=draft}} 4 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} {{ill|632|ja|632nd year|12=draft}} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日|12=draft}} ) – The first {{ill|Kentōshi|ja|Kentōshi (envoy to Tang China)|12=draft}} mission returns to Japan. * {{ill|Emperor Monmu|ja|文武天皇|12=draft}} 2 (Julian {{ill|698|ja|698th year|12=draft}} {{ill|November 12|ja|11月12日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Yakushi-ji|ja|薬師寺|12=draft}} , founded by the will of {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu|12=draft}} , is established in {{ill|Fujiwara-kyō|ja|藤原京|12=draft}} . * {{ill|Ōan (Japan)|ja|応安|12=draft}} 5 / {{ill|Bunchū (Japan)|ja|文中|12=draft}} 1 (Julian {{ill|1372|ja|1372nd year|12=draft}} {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日|12=draft}} ) – The {{ill|Southern Court (Japan)|ja|南朝 (日本)|12=draft}} changes the era name from {{ill|Kenchoku|ja|建徳|12=draft}} to Bunchū. * {{ill|Hōei (Japan)|ja|宝永|12=draft}} 4 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1707|ja|1707th year|12=draft}} {{ill|October 28|ja|10月28日|12=draft}} ) – A major earthquake strikes {{ill|Tōtōmi Province|ja|遠江国|12=draft}} and the {{ill|Kii Province|ja|紀伊国|12=draft}} coast, known as the {{ill|Hōei earthquake|ja|宝永の大Earthquake|12=draft}} , with a magnitude of 8.4, making it one of Japan’s largest recorded earthquakes. * {{ill|Kyōhō (era)|ja|享保|12=draft}} 1 (Gregorian {{ill|1716|ja|1716th year|12=draft}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Arai Hakuseki|ja|新井白石|12=draft}} begins writing his autobiography, *{{ill|Oridataku Shiba no Ki|ja|折たく柴の記|12=draft}} *. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1872|ja|1872nd year|12=draft}} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日|12=draft}} ) – The government-run {{ill|Tomioka Silk Mill|ja|富岡製糸場|12=draft}} begins operations.
== Births == * {{ill|Keichō (era)|ja|Keichō|12=draft}} 12 (Gregorian {{ill|1607|ja|1607th year|12=draft}} {{ill|November 23|ja|11月23日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Masako|ja|徳川和子|12=draft}} (known as {{ill|Tōfukumon-in|ja|東福門院|12=draft}} ), consort of {{ill|Emperor Go-Mizunoo|ja|後水尾天皇|12=draft}} and daughter of {{ill|Tokugawa Hidetada|ja|徳川秀忠|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1678|ja|1678th year|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|3|10|5|9|4|11|10|1004}}

revision.text:
{{旧暦10月}} '''旧暦10月4日'''（きゅうれきじゅうがつよっか）は[[10月 (旧暦)|旧暦10月]]の4日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]]である。
== できごと == * [[舒明天皇]]4年（[[ユリウス暦]][[632年]][[11月21日]]） - 第1回[[遣唐使]]が帰国 * [[文武天皇]]2年（ユリウス暦[[698年]][[11月12日]]） - [[藤原京]]に天武天皇の発願による[[薬師寺]]が建立 * [[応安]]5年/[[文中]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1372年]][[10月30日]]） - [[南朝 (日本)|南朝]]が[[建徳]]から文中に[[改元]] * [[宝永]]4年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1707年]][[10月28日]]） - [[遠江国|遠州]]・[[紀伊国|紀州]]灘で[[地震|大地震]]（[[宝永の大地震]]）。[[マグニチュード|M]]8.4で日本最大級の地震 * [[享保]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1716年]][[11月17日]]） - [[新井白石]]が自叙伝『折たく柴の記』を起筆 * [[明治]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1872年]][[11月4日]]） - 官営[[富岡製糸場]]が操業開始
== 誕生日 == * [[慶長]]12年（グレゴリオ暦[[1607年]][[11月23日]]） - [[徳川和子]]（東福門院）、[[後水尾天皇]]の中宮・[[徳川秀忠]]の子（+ [[1678年]]）
== 忌日 ==
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|10|3|10|5|9|4|11|10|1004}}

revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[10月4日 (旧暦)]] to [[October 4 (Lunisolar)]] without leaving a redirect: Bot: merge import

{{旧暦10月}} '''旧暦10月4日'''（きゅうれきじゅうがつよっか）は[[10月 (旧暦)|旧暦10月]]の4日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]]である。
== できごと == * [[舒明天皇]]4年（[[ユリウス暦]][[632年]][[11月21日]]） - 第1回[[遣唐使]]が帰国 * [[文武天皇]]2年（ユリウス暦[[698年]][[11月12日]]） - [[藤原京]]に天武天皇の発願による[[薬師寺]]が建立 * [[応安]]5年/[[文中]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1372年]][[10月30日]]） - [[南朝 (日本)|南朝]]が[[建徳]]から文中に[[改元]] * [[宝永]]4年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1707年]][[10月28日]]） - [[遠江国|遠州]]・[[紀伊国|紀州]]灘で[[地震|大地震]]（[[宝永の大地震]]）。[[マグニチュード|M]]8.4で日本最大級の地震 * [[享保]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1716年]][[11月17日]]） - [[新井白石]]が自叙伝『折たく柴の記』を起筆 * [[明治]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1872年]][[11月4日]]） - 官営[[富岡製糸場]]が操業開始

Copying from [[Category:Lunisolar October]] to [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: add simplewiki draft link to ill templates
Bot: replace {{ill}} with enwiki link via Wikidata
Text replacement - " (Lunisolar)}}<!--hatnote-->↵{{Not to be confused with|" to "|qq="
Text replacement - "<!--hatnote-->" to "[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->"

Bot: remove deleted category Japanese historical events
Bot: prepend Wikidata AFC comment via pages.txt

Bot: remove incorrect Shona (sn:) interwiki links
Bot: categorize based on Wikidata P11250 property
revision.text:
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q840358]] Wikidata name: 4th day of the 10th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:42, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|October 4|qq=October 4}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月初四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 4일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 4''' is the 4th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|qid=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Emperor Jomei|Emperor Jomei]] 4 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:632|632]] [[:en:November 21|November 21]] ) – The first {{ill|Kentōshi|ja|Kentōshi (envoy to Tang China)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kentōshi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} mission returns to Japan. * [[:en:Emperor Monmu|Emperor Monmu]] 2 (Julian [[:en:698|698]] [[:en:November 12|November 12]] ) – [[:en:Yakushi-ji|Yakushi-ji]] , founded by the will of {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|1=Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|1=Emperor Tenmu|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q335181}} , is established in [[:en:Fujiwara-kyō|Fujiwara-kyō]] . * [[:en:Ōan|Ōan era]] 5 / [[:en:Bunchū|Bunchū (Japan)]] 1 (Julian [[:en:1372|1372]] [[:en:October 30|October 30]] ) – The [[:en:Southern Court|Southern Court (Japan)]] changes the era name from [[:en:Kentoku|Kenchoku]] to Bunchū. * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei (Japan)]] 4 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1707|1707]] [[:en:October 28|October 28]] ) – A major earthquake strikes [[:en:Tōtōmi Province|Tōtōmi Province]] and the [[:en:Kii Province|Kii Province]] coast, known as the {{ill|Hōei earthquake|ja|宝永の大Earthquake|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōei earthquake|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , with a magnitude of 8.4, making it one of Japan’s largest recorded earthquakes. * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō (era)]] 1 (Gregorian [[:en:1716|1716]] [[:en:November 17|November 17]] ) – [[:en:Arai Hakuseki|Arai Hakuseki]] begins writing his autobiography, *[[:en:Oritaku Shiba no Ki|Oridataku Shiba no Ki]] *. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:November 4|November 4]] ) – The government-run [[:en:Tomioka Silk Mill|Tomioka Silk Mill]] begins operations.
== Births == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 12 (Gregorian [[:en:1607|1607]] [[:en:November 23|November 23]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Masako|Tokugawa Masako]] (known as {{ill|Tōfukumon-in|ja|東福門院|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōfukumon-in|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 徳川和子|1=Tokugawa Masako|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q911334}} ), consort of [[:en:Emperor Go-Mizunoo|Emperor Go-Mizunoo]] and daughter of [[:en:Tokugawa Hidetada|Tokugawa Hidetada]] (+ [[:en:1678|1678]] ). == Deaths ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|3|10|5|9|4|11|10|1004|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月初四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 4일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 4''' is the 4th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|qid=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Emperor Jomei|Emperor Jomei]] 4 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:632|632]] [[:en:November 21|November 21]] ) – The first {{ill|Kentōshi|ja|Kentōshi (envoy to Tang China)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kentōshi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} mission returns to Japan. * [[:en:Emperor Monmu|Emperor Monmu]] 2 (Julian [[:en:698|698]] [[:en:November 12|November 12]] ) – [[:en:Yakushi-ji|Yakushi-ji]] , founded by the will of {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|1=Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|1=Emperor Tenmu|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q335181}} , is established in [[:en:Fujiwara-kyō|Fujiwara-kyō]] . * [[:en:Ōan|Ōan era]] 5 / [[:en:Bunchū|Bunchū (Japan)]] 1 (Julian [[:en:1372|1372]] [[:en:October 30|October 30]] ) – The [[:en:Southern Court|Southern Court (Japan)]] changes the era name from [[:en:Kentoku|Kenchoku]] to Bunchū. * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei (Japan)]] 4 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1707|1707]] [[:en:October 28|October 28]] ) – A major earthquake strikes [[:en:Tōtōmi Province|Tōtōmi Province]] and the [[:en:Kii Province|Kii Province]] coast, known as the {{ill|Hōei earthquake|ja|宝永の大Earthquake|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōei earthquake|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , with a magnitude of 8.4, making it one of Japan’s largest recorded earthquakes. * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō (era)]] 1 (Gregorian [[:en:1716|1716]] [[:en:November 17|November 17]] ) – [[:en:Arai Hakuseki|Arai Hakuseki]] begins writing his autobiography, *[[:en:Oritaku Shiba no Ki|Oridataku Shiba no Ki]] *. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:November 4|November 4]] ) – The government-run [[:en:Tomioka Silk Mill|Tomioka Silk Mill]] begins operations.
== Births == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 12 (Gregorian [[:en:1607|1607]] [[:en:November 23|November 23]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Masako|Tokugawa Masako]] (known as {{ill|Tōfukumon-in|ja|東福門院|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōfukumon-in|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 徳川和子|1=Tokugawa Masako|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q911334}} ), consort of [[:en:Emperor Go-Mizunoo|Emperor Go-Mizunoo]] and daughter of [[:en:Tokugawa Hidetada|Tokugawa Hidetada]] (+ [[:en:1678|1678]] ). == Deaths ==

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月初四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 4일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 4''' is the 4th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|qid=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Emperor Jomei|Emperor Jomei]] 4 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:632|632]] [[:en:November 21|November 21]] ) – The first {{ill|Kentōshi|ja|Kentōshi (envoy to Tang China)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kentōshi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} mission returns to Japan. * [[:en:Emperor Monmu|Emperor Monmu]] 2 (Julian [[:en:698|698]] [[:en:November 12|November 12]] ) – [[:en:Yakushi-ji|Yakushi-ji]] , founded by the will of {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|1=Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|1=Emperor Tenmu|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q335181}} , is established in [[:en:Fujiwara-kyō|Fujiwara-kyō]] . * [[:en:Ōan|Ōan era]] 5 / [[:en:Bunchū|Bunchū (Japan)]] 1 (Julian [[:en:1372|1372]] [[:en:October 30|October 30]] ) – The [[:en:Southern Court|Southern Court (Japan)]] changes the era name from [[:en:Kentoku|Kenchoku]] to Bunchū. * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei (Japan)]] 4 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1707|1707]] [[:en:October 28|October 28]] ) – A major earthquake strikes [[:en:Tōtōmi Province|Tōtōmi Province]] and the [[:en:Kii Province|Kii Province]] coast, known as the {{ill|Hōei earthquake|ja|宝永の大Earthquake|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōei earthquake|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , with a magnitude of 8.4, making it one of Japan’s largest recorded earthquakes. * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō (era)]] 1 (Gregorian [[:en:1716|1716]] [[:en:November 17|November 17]] ) – [[:en:Arai Hakuseki|Arai Hakuseki]] begins writing his autobiography, *[[:en:Oritaku Shiba no Ki|Oridataku Shiba no Ki]] *. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:November 4|November 4]] ) – The government-run [[:en:Tomioka Silk Mill|Tomioka Silk Mill]] begins operations.
== Births == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 12 (Gregorian [[:en:1607|1607]] [[:en:November 23|November 23]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Masako|Tokugawa Masako]] (known as {{ill|Tōfukumon-in|ja|東福門院|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōfukumon-in|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 徳川和子|1=Tokugawa Masako|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q911334}} ), consort of [[:en:Emperor Go-Mizunoo|Emperor Go-Mizunoo]] and daughter of [[:en:Tokugawa Hidetada|Tokugawa Hidetada]] (+ [[:en:1678|1678]] ). == Deaths ==

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|qid=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Emperor Jomei|Emperor Jomei]] 4 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:632|632]] [[:en:November 21|November 21]] ) – The first {{ill|Kentōshi|ja|Kentōshi (envoy to Tang China)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kentōshi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} mission returns to Japan. * [[:en:Emperor Monmu|Emperor Monmu]] 2 (Julian [[:en:698|698]] [[:en:November 12|November 12]] ) – [[:en:Yakushi-ji|Yakushi-ji]] , founded by the will of {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|1=Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|1=Emperor Tenmu|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q335181}} , is established in [[:en:Fujiwara-kyō|Fujiwara-kyō]] . * [[:en:Ōan|Ōan era]] 5 / [[:en:Bunchū|Bunchū (Japan)]] 1 (Julian [[:en:1372|1372]] [[:en:October 30|October 30]] ) – The [[:en:Southern Court|Southern Court (Japan)]] changes the era name from [[:en:Kentoku|Kenchoku]] to Bunchū. * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei (Japan)]] 4 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1707|1707]] [[:en:October 28|October 28]] ) – A major earthquake strikes [[:en:Tōtōmi Province|Tōtōmi Province]] and the [[:en:Kii Province|Kii Province]] coast, known as the {{ill|Hōei earthquake|ja|宝永の大Earthquake|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōei earthquake|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , with a magnitude of 8.4, making it one of Japan’s largest recorded earthquakes. * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō (era)]] 1 (Gregorian [[:en:1716|1716]] [[:en:November 17|November 17]] ) – [[:en:Arai Hakuseki|Arai Hakuseki]] begins writing his autobiography, *[[:en:Oritaku Shiba no Ki|Oridataku Shiba no Ki]] *. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:November 4|November 4]] ) – The government-run [[:en:Tomioka Silk Mill|Tomioka Silk Mill]] begins operations.
== Births == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 12 (Gregorian [[:en:1607|1607]] [[:en:November 23|November 23]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Masako|Tokugawa Masako]] (known as {{ill|Tōfukumon-in|ja|東福門院|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōfukumon-in|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 徳川和子|1=Tokugawa Masako|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q911334}} ), consort of [[:en:Emperor Go-Mizunoo|Emperor Go-Mizunoo]] and daughter of [[:en:Tokugawa Hidetada|Tokugawa Hidetada]] (+ [[:en:1678|1678]] ). == Deaths ==

== Events == * [[:en:Emperor Jomei|Emperor Jomei]] 4 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:632|632]] [[:en:November 21|November 21]] ) – The first {{ill|Kentōshi|ja|Kentōshi (envoy to Tang China)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kentōshi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} mission returns to Japan. * [[:en:Emperor Monmu|Emperor Monmu]] 2 (Julian [[:en:698|698]] [[:en:November 12|November 12]] ) – [[:en:Yakushi-ji|Yakushi-ji]] , founded by the will of {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|1=Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|1=Emperor Tenmu|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q335181}} , is established in [[:en:Fujiwara-kyō|Fujiwara-kyō]] . * [[:en:Ōan|Ōan era]] 5 / [[:en:Bunchū|Bunchū (Japan)]] 1 (Julian [[:en:1372|1372]] [[:en:October 30|October 30]] ) – The [[:en:Southern Court|Southern Court (Japan)]] changes the era name from [[:en:Kentoku|Kenchoku]] to Bunchū. * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei (Japan)]] 4 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1707|1707]] [[:en:October 28|October 28]] ) – A major earthquake strikes [[:en:Tōtōmi Province|Tōtōmi Province]] and the [[:en:Kii Province|Kii Province]] coast, known as the {{ill|Hōei earthquake|ja|宝永の大Earthquake|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōei earthquake|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , with a magnitude of 8.4, making it one of Japan’s largest recorded earthquakes. * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō (era)]] 1 (Gregorian [[:en:1716|1716]] [[:en:November 17|November 17]] ) – [[:en:Arai Hakuseki|Arai Hakuseki]] begins writing his autobiography, *[[:en:Oritaku Shiba no Ki|Oridataku Shiba no Ki]] *. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:November 4|November 4]] ) – The government-run [[:en:Tomioka Silk Mill|Tomioka Silk Mill]] begins operations.
== Births == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 12 (Gregorian [[:en:1607|1607]] [[:en:November 23|November 23]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Masako|Tokugawa Masako]] (known as {{ill|Tōfukumon-in|ja|東福門院|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōfukumon-in|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 徳川和子|1=Tokugawa Masako|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q911334}} ), consort of [[:en:Emperor Go-Mizunoo|Emperor Go-Mizunoo]] and daughter of [[:en:Tokugawa Hidetada|Tokugawa Hidetada]] (+ [[:en:1678|1678]] ). == Deaths ==

== Births == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 12 (Gregorian [[:en:1607|1607]] [[:en:November 23|November 23]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Masako|Tokugawa Masako]] (known as {{ill|Tōfukumon-in|ja|東福門院|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōfukumon-in|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 徳川和子|1=Tokugawa Masako|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q911334}} ), consort of [[:en:Emperor Go-Mizunoo|Emperor Go-Mizunoo]] and daughter of [[:en:Tokugawa Hidetada|Tokugawa Hidetada]] (+ [[:en:1678|1678]] ). == Deaths ==

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月4日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 4일]][[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十月初四]][[zh:十月初四]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840358]] Wikidata name: 4th day of the 10th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:42, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|October 4|qq=October 4}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月初四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 4일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 4''' is the 4th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Emperor Jomei|Emperor Jomei]] 4 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:632|632]] [[:en:November 21|November 21]] ) – The first {{ill|Kentōshi|ja|Kentōshi (envoy to Tang China)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kentōshi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} mission returns to Japan. * [[:en:Emperor Monmu|Emperor Monmu]] 2 (Julian [[:en:698|698]] [[:en:November 12|November 12]] ) – [[:en:Yakushi-ji|Yakushi-ji]] , founded by the will of {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|1=Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|1=Emperor Tenmu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q335181}} , is established in [[:en:Fujiwara-kyō|Fujiwara-kyō]] . * [[:en:Ōan|Ōan era]] 5 / [[:en:Bunchū|Bunchū (Japan)]] 1 (Julian [[:en:1372|1372]] [[:en:October 30|October 30]] ) – The [[:en:Southern Court|Southern Court (Japan)]] changes the era name from [[:en:Kentoku|Kenchoku]] to Bunchū. * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei (Japan)]] 4 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1707|1707]] [[:en:October 28|October 28]] ) – A major earthquake strikes [[:en:Tōtōmi Province|Tōtōmi Province]] and the [[:en:Kii Province|Kii Province]] coast, known as the {{ill|Hōei earthquake|ja|宝永の大Earthquake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōei earthquake|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , with a magnitude of 8.4, making it one of Japan’s largest recorded earthquakes. * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō (era)]] 1 (Gregorian [[:en:1716|1716]] [[:en:November 17|November 17]] ) – [[:en:Arai Hakuseki|Arai Hakuseki]] begins writing his autobiography, *[[:en:Oritaku Shiba no Ki|Oridataku Shiba no Ki]] *. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:November 4|November 4]] ) – The government-run [[:en:Tomioka Silk Mill|Tomioka Silk Mill]] begins operations.
== Births == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 12 (Gregorian [[:en:1607|1607]] [[:en:November 23|November 23]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Masako|Tokugawa Masako]] (known as {{ill|Tōfukumon-in|ja|東福門院|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōfukumon-in|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 徳川和子|1=Tokugawa Masako|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q911334}} ), consort of [[:en:Emperor Go-Mizunoo|Emperor Go-Mizunoo]] and daughter of [[:en:Tokugawa Hidetada|Tokugawa Hidetada]] (+ [[:en:1678|1678]] ). == Deaths ==

== Events == * [[:en:Emperor Jomei|Emperor Jomei]] 4 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:632|632]] [[:en:November 21|November 21]] ) – The first {{ill|Kentōshi|ja|Kentōshi (envoy to Tang China)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kentōshi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} mission returns to Japan. * [[:en:Emperor Monmu|Emperor Monmu]] 2 (Julian [[:en:698|698]] [[:en:November 12|November 12]] ) – [[:en:Yakushi-ji|Yakushi-ji]] , founded by the will of {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|1=Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|1=Emperor Tenmu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q335181}} , is established in [[:en:Fujiwara-kyō|Fujiwara-kyō]] . * [[:en:Ōan|Ōan era]] 5 / [[:en:Bunchū|Bunchū (Japan)]] 1 (Julian [[:en:1372|1372]] [[:en:October 30|October 30]] ) – The [[:en:Southern Court|Southern Court (Japan)]] changes the era name from [[:en:Kentoku|Kenchoku]] to Bunchū. * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei (Japan)]] 4 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1707|1707]] [[:en:October 28|October 28]] ) – A major earthquake strikes [[:en:Tōtōmi Province|Tōtōmi Province]] and the [[:en:Kii Province|Kii Province]] coast, known as the {{ill|Hōei earthquake|ja|宝永の大Earthquake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōei earthquake|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , with a magnitude of 8.4, making it one of Japan’s largest recorded earthquakes. * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō (era)]] 1 (Gregorian [[:en:1716|1716]] [[:en:November 17|November 17]] ) – [[:en:Arai Hakuseki|Arai Hakuseki]] begins writing his autobiography, *[[:en:Oritaku Shiba no Ki|Oridataku Shiba no Ki]] *. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:November 4|November 4]] ) – The government-run [[:en:Tomioka Silk Mill|Tomioka Silk Mill]] begins operations.
== Births == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 12 (Gregorian [[:en:1607|1607]] [[:en:November 23|November 23]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Masako|Tokugawa Masako]] (known as {{ill|Tōfukumon-in|ja|東福門院|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōfukumon-in|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 徳川和子|1=Tokugawa Masako|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q911334}} ), consort of [[:en:Emperor Go-Mizunoo|Emperor Go-Mizunoo]] and daughter of [[:en:Tokugawa Hidetada|Tokugawa Hidetada]] (+ [[:en:1678|1678]] ). == Deaths ==
== See Also ==

== Events == * [[:en:Emperor Jomei|Emperor Jomei]] 4 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:632|632]] [[:en:November 21|November 21]] ) – The first {{ill|Kentōshi|ja|Kentōshi (envoy to Tang China)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kentōshi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} mission returns to Japan. * [[:en:Emperor Monmu|Emperor Monmu]] 2 (Julian [[:en:698|698]] [[:en:November 12|November 12]] ) – [[:en:Yakushi-ji|Yakushi-ji]] , founded by the will of {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|1=Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|1=Emperor Tenmu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q335181}} , is established in [[:en:Fujiwara-kyō|Fujiwara-kyō]] . * [[:en:Ōan|Ōan era]] 5 / [[:en:Bunchū|Bunchū (Japan)]] 1 (Julian [[:en:1372|1372]] [[:en:October 30|October 30]] ) – The [[:en:Southern Court|Southern Court (Japan)]] changes the era name from [[:en:Kentoku|Kenchoku]] to Bunchū. * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei (Japan)]] 4 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1707|1707]] [[:en:October 28|October 28]] ) – A major earthquake strikes [[:en:Tōtōmi Province|Tōtōmi Province]] and the [[:en:Kii Province|Kii Province]] coast, known as the {{ill|Hōei earthquake|ja|宝永の大Earthquake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōei earthquake|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , with a magnitude of 8.4, making it one of Japan’s largest recorded earthquakes. * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō (era)]] 1 (Gregorian [[:en:1716|1716]] [[:en:November 17|November 17]] ) – [[:en:Arai Hakuseki|Arai Hakuseki]] begins writing his autobiography, *[[:en:Oritaku Shiba no Ki|Oridataku Shiba no Ki]] *. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:November 4|November 4]] ) – The government-run [[:en:Tomioka Silk Mill|Tomioka Silk Mill]] begins operations.
== Births == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 12 (Gregorian [[:en:1607|1607]] [[:en:November 23|November 23]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Masako|Tokugawa Masako]] (known as {{ill|Tōfukumon-in|ja|東福門院|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōfukumon-in|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 徳川和子|1=Tokugawa Masako|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q911334}} ), consort of [[:en:Emperor Go-Mizunoo|Emperor Go-Mizunoo]] and daughter of [[:en:Tokugawa Hidetada|Tokugawa Hidetada]] (+ [[:en:1678|1678]] ). == Deaths ==

== Events == * [[:en:Emperor Jomei|Emperor Jomei]] 4 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:632|632]] [[:en:November 21|November 21]] ) – The first {{ill|Kentōshi|ja|Kentōshi (envoy to Tang China)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kentōshi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} mission returns to Japan. * [[:en:Emperor Monmu|Emperor Monmu]] 2 (Julian [[:en:698|698]] [[:en:November 12|November 12]] ) – [[:en:Yakushi-ji|Yakushi-ji]] , founded by the will of {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|1=Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|1=Emperor Tenmu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q335181}} , is established in [[:en:Fujiwara-kyō|Fujiwara-kyō]] . * [[:en:Ōan|Ōan era]] 5 / [[:en:Bunchū|Bunchū (Japan)]] 1 (Julian [[:en:1372|1372]] [[:en:October 30|October 30]] ) – The [[:en:Southern Court|Southern Court (Japan)]] changes the era name from [[:en:Kentoku|Kenchoku]] to Bunchū. * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei (Japan)]] 4 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1707|1707]] [[:en:October 28|October 28]] ) – A major earthquake strikes [[:en:Tōtōmi Province|Tōtōmi Province]] and the [[:en:Kii Province|Kii Province]] coast, known as the {{ill|Hōei earthquake|ja|宝永の大Earthquake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōei earthquake|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , with a magnitude of 8.4, making it one of Japan’s largest recorded earthquakes. * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō (era)]] 1 (Gregorian [[:en:1716|1716]] [[:en:November 17|November 17]] ) – [[:en:Arai Hakuseki|Arai Hakuseki]] begins writing his autobiography, *[[:en:Oritaku Shiba no Ki|Oridataku Shiba no Ki]] *. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:November 4|November 4]] ) – The government-run [[:en:Tomioka Silk Mill|Tomioka Silk Mill]] begins operations.
== Births == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 12 (Gregorian [[:en:1607|1607]] [[:en:November 23|November 23]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Masako|Tokugawa Masako]] (known as {{ill|Tōfukumon-in|ja|東福門院|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōfukumon-in|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 徳川和子|1=Tokugawa Masako|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q911334}} ), consort of [[:en:Emperor Go-Mizunoo|Emperor Go-Mizunoo]] and daughter of [[:en:Tokugawa Hidetada|Tokugawa Hidetada]] (+ [[:en:1678|1678]] ). == Deaths ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|3|10|5|9|4|11|10|1004|qq=}}
