== Events == * [[:en:Emperor Jomei|Emperor Jomei]] 4 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:632|632]] [[:en:November 21|November 21]] ) – The first {{ill|Kentōshi|ja|Kentōshi (envoy to Tang China)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kentōshi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} mission returns to Japan. * [[:en:Emperor Monmu|Emperor Monmu]] 2 (Julian [[:en:698|698]] [[:en:November 12|November 12]] ) – [[:en:Yakushi-ji|Yakushi-ji]] , founded by the will of {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|1=Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|1=Emperor Tenmu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q335181}} , is established in [[:en:Fujiwara-kyō|Fujiwara-kyō]] . * [[:en:Ōan|Ōan era]] 5 / [[:en:Bunchū|Bunchū (Japan)]] 1 (Julian [[:en:1372|1372]] [[:en:October 30|October 30]] ) – The [[:en:Southern Court|Southern Court (Japan)]] changes the era name from [[:en:Kentoku|Kenchoku]] to Bunchū. * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei (Japan)]] 4 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1707|1707]] [[:en:October 28|October 28]] ) – A major earthquake strikes [[:en:Tōtōmi Province|Tōtōmi Province]] and the [[:en:Kii Province|Kii Province]] coast, known as the {{ill|Hōei earthquake|ja|宝永の大Earthquake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōei earthquake|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , with a magnitude of 8.4, making it one of Japan’s largest recorded earthquakes. * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō (era)]] 1 (Gregorian [[:en:1716|1716]] [[:en:November 17|November 17]] ) – [[:en:Arai Hakuseki|Arai Hakuseki]] begins writing his autobiography, *[[:en:Oritaku Shiba no Ki|Oridataku Shiba no Ki]] *. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:November 4|November 4]] ) – The government-run [[:en:Tomioka Silk Mill|Tomioka Silk Mill]] begins operations.
== Births == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 12 (Gregorian [[:en:1607|1607]] [[:en:November 23|November 23]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Masako|Tokugawa Masako]] (known as {{ill|Tōfukumon-in|ja|東福門院|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōfukumon-in|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 徳川和子|1=Tokugawa Masako|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q911334}} ), consort of [[:en:Emperor Go-Mizunoo|Emperor Go-Mizunoo]] and daughter of [[:en:Tokugawa Hidetada|Tokugawa Hidetada]] (+ [[:en:1678|1678]] ). == Deaths ==

== Events == * [[:en:Emperor Jomei|Emperor Jomei]] 4 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:632|632]] [[:en:November 21|November 21]] ) – The first {{ill|Kentōshi|ja|Kentōshi (envoy to Tang China)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kentōshi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} mission returns to Japan. * [[:en:Emperor Monmu|Emperor Monmu]] 2 (Julian [[:en:698|698]] [[:en:November 12|November 12]] ) – [[:en:Yakushi-ji|Yakushi-ji]] , founded by the will of {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|1=Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|1=Emperor Tenmu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q335181}} , is established in [[:en:Fujiwara-kyō|Fujiwara-kyō]] . * [[:en:Ōan|Ōan era]] 5 / [[:en:Bunchū|Bunchū (Japan)]] 1 (Julian [[:en:1372|1372]] [[:en:October 30|October 30]] ) – The [[:en:Southern Court|Southern Court (Japan)]] changes the era name from [[:en:Kentoku|Kenchoku]] to Bunchū. * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei (Japan)]] 4 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1707|1707]] [[:en:October 28|October 28]] ) – A major earthquake strikes [[:en:Tōtōmi Province|Tōtōmi Province]] and the [[:en:Kii Province|Kii Province]] coast, known as the {{ill|Hōei earthquake|ja|宝永の大Earthquake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōei earthquake|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , with a magnitude of 8.4, making it one of Japan’s largest recorded earthquakes. * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō (era)]] 1 (Gregorian [[:en:1716|1716]] [[:en:November 17|November 17]] ) – [[:en:Arai Hakuseki|Arai Hakuseki]] begins writing his autobiography, *[[:en:Oritaku Shiba no Ki|Oridataku Shiba no Ki]] *. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:November 4|November 4]] ) – The government-run [[:en:Tomioka Silk Mill|Tomioka Silk Mill]] begins operations.
== Births == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 12 (Gregorian [[:en:1607|1607]] [[:en:November 23|November 23]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Masako|Tokugawa Masako]] (known as {{ill|Tōfukumon-in|ja|東福門院|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōfukumon-in|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 徳川和子|1=Tokugawa Masako|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q911334}} ), consort of [[:en:Emperor Go-Mizunoo|Emperor Go-Mizunoo]] and daughter of [[:en:Tokugawa Hidetada|Tokugawa Hidetada]] (+ [[:en:1678|1678]] ). == Deaths ==

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Emperor Jomei|en|Emperor Jomei|WD=Q329761|lt=Emperor Jomei}} 4 ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|632|en|632|WD=Q23887|lt=632}} {{ill|November 21|en|November 21|WD=Q3023|lt=November 21}} ) – The first {{ill|Kentōshi|ja|Kentōshi (envoy to Tang China)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kentōshi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} mission returns to Japan. * {{ill|Emperor Monmu|en|Emperor Monmu|WD=Q357246|lt=Emperor Monmu}} 2 (Julian {{ill|698|en|698|WD=Q23491|lt=698}} {{ill|November 12|en|November 12|WD=Q2986|lt=November 12}} ) – {{ill|Yakushi-ji|en|Yakushi-ji|WD=Q945913|lt=Yakushi-ji}} , founded by the will of {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|1=Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|1=Emperor Tenmu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q335181}} , is established in {{ill|Fujiwara-kyō|en|Fujiwara-kyō|WD=Q1196381|lt=Fujiwara-kyō}} . * {{ill|Ōan|en|Ōan|WD=Q1146245|lt=Ōan era}} 5 / {{ill|Bunchū|en|Bunchū|WD=Q1194181|lt=Bunchū (Japan)}} 1 (Julian {{ill|1372|en|1372|WD=Q6258|lt=1372}} {{ill|October 30|en|October 30|WD=Q2950|lt=October 30}} ) – The {{ill|Southern Court|en|Southern Court|WD=Q3001082|lt=Southern Court (Japan)}} changes the era name from {{ill|Kentoku|en|Kentoku|WD=Q1143922|lt=Kenchoku}} to Bunchū. * {{ill|Hōei|en|Hōei|WD=Q1145262|lt=Hōei (Japan)}} 4 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1707|en|1707|WD=Q6841|lt=1707}} {{ill|October 28|en|October 28|WD=Q2952|lt=October 28}} ) – A major earthquake strikes {{ill|Tōtōmi Province|en|Tōtōmi Province|WD=Q1048864|lt=Tōtōmi Province}} and the {{ill|Kii Province|en|Kii Province|WD=Q864053|lt=Kii Province}} coast, known as the {{ill|Hōei earthquake|ja|宝永の大Earthquake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōei earthquake|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , with a magnitude of 8.4, making it one of Japan’s largest recorded earthquakes. * {{ill|Kyōhō|en|Kyōhō|WD=Q1145048|lt=Kyōhō (era)}} 1 (Gregorian {{ill|1716|en|1716|WD=Q6892|lt=1716}} {{ill|November 17|en|November 17|WD=Q3028|lt=November 17}} ) – {{ill|Arai Hakuseki|en|Arai Hakuseki|WD=Q467616|lt=Arai Hakuseki}} begins writing his autobiography, *{{ill|Oritaku Shiba no Ki|en|Oritaku Shiba no Ki|WD=Q3007804|lt=Oridataku Shiba no Ki}} *. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1872|en|1872|WD=Q7753|lt=1872}} {{ill|November 4|en|November 4|WD=Q2994|lt=November 4}} ) – The government-run {{ill|Tomioka Silk Mill|en|Tomioka Silk Mill|WD=Q7818931|lt=Tomioka Silk Mill}} begins operations.
== Births == * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|WD=Q1328185|lt=Keichō}} 12 (Gregorian {{ill|1607|en|1607|WD=Q6756|lt=1607}} {{ill|November 23|en|November 23|WD=Q3021|lt=November 23}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Masako|en|Tokugawa Masako|WD=Q911334|lt=Tokugawa Masako}} (known as {{ill|Tōfukumon-in|ja|東福門院|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōfukumon-in|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 徳川和子|1=Tokugawa Masako|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q911334}} ), consort of {{ill|Emperor Go-Mizunoo|en|Emperor Go-Mizunoo|WD=Q320229|lt=Emperor Go-Mizunoo}} and daughter of {{ill|Tokugawa Hidetada|en|Tokugawa Hidetada|WD=Q314464|lt=Tokugawa Hidetada}} (+ {{ill|1678|en|1678|WD=Q7634|lt=1678}} ). == Deaths ==

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月4日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 4일]][[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十月初四]][[zh:十月初四]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月4日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 4일]][[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十月初四]][[zh:十月初四]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月4日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 4일]][[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十月初四]][[zh:十月初四]]
{{Not to be confused with|October 4|qq=October 4}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月初四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 4일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 4''' is the 4th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Emperor Jomei|en|Emperor Jomei|WD=Q329761|lt=Emperor Jomei}} 4 ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|632|en|632|WD=Q23887|lt=632}} {{ill|November 21|en|November 21|WD=Q3023|lt=November 21}} ) – The first {{ill|Kentōshi|ja|Kentōshi (envoy to Tang China)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kentōshi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} mission returns to Japan. * {{ill|Emperor Monmu|en|Emperor Monmu|WD=Q357246|lt=Emperor Monmu}} 2 (Julian {{ill|698|en|698|WD=Q23491|lt=698}} {{ill|November 12|en|November 12|WD=Q2986|lt=November 12}} ) – {{ill|Yakushi-ji|en|Yakushi-ji|WD=Q945913|lt=Yakushi-ji}} , founded by the will of {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|1=Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|1=Emperor Tenmu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q335181}} , is established in {{ill|Fujiwara-kyō|en|Fujiwara-kyō|WD=Q1196381|lt=Fujiwara-kyō}} . * {{ill|Ōan|en|Ōan|WD=Q1146245|lt=Ōan era}} 5 / {{ill|Bunchū|en|Bunchū|WD=Q1194181|lt=Bunchū (Japan)}} 1 (Julian {{ill|1372|en|1372|WD=Q6258|lt=1372}} {{ill|October 30|en|October 30|WD=Q2950|lt=October 30}} ) – The {{ill|Southern Court|en|Southern Court|WD=Q3001082|lt=Southern Court (Japan)}} changes the era name from {{ill|Kentoku|en|Kentoku|WD=Q1143922|lt=Kenchoku}} to Bunchū. * {{ill|Hōei|en|Hōei|WD=Q1145262|lt=Hōei (Japan)}} 4 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1707|en|1707|WD=Q6841|lt=1707}} {{ill|October 28|en|October 28|WD=Q2952|lt=October 28}} ) – A major earthquake strikes {{ill|Tōtōmi Province|en|Tōtōmi Province|WD=Q1048864|lt=Tōtōmi Province}} and the {{ill|Kii Province|en|Kii Province|WD=Q864053|lt=Kii Province}} coast, known as the {{ill|Hōei earthquake|ja|宝永の大Earthquake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōei earthquake|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , with a magnitude of 8.4, making it one of Japan’s largest recorded earthquakes. * {{ill|Kyōhō|en|Kyōhō|WD=Q1145048|lt=Kyōhō (era)}} 1 (Gregorian {{ill|1716|en|1716|WD=Q6892|lt=1716}} {{ill|November 17|en|November 17|WD=Q3028|lt=November 17}} ) – {{ill|Arai Hakuseki|en|Arai Hakuseki|WD=Q467616|lt=Arai Hakuseki}} begins writing his autobiography, *{{ill|Oritaku Shiba no Ki|en|Oritaku Shiba no Ki|WD=Q3007804|lt=Oridataku Shiba no Ki}} *. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1872|en|1872|WD=Q7753|lt=1872}} {{ill|November 4|en|November 4|WD=Q2994|lt=November 4}} ) – The government-run {{ill|Tomioka Silk Mill|en|Tomioka Silk Mill|WD=Q7818931|lt=Tomioka Silk Mill}} begins operations.
== Births == * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|WD=Q1328185|lt=Keichō}} 12 (Gregorian {{ill|1607|en|1607|WD=Q6756|lt=1607}} {{ill|November 23|en|November 23|WD=Q3021|lt=November 23}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Masako|en|Tokugawa Masako|WD=Q911334|lt=Tokugawa Masako}} (known as {{ill|Tōfukumon-in|ja|東福門院|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōfukumon-in|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 徳川和子|1=Tokugawa Masako|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q911334}} ), consort of {{ill|Emperor Go-Mizunoo|en|Emperor Go-Mizunoo|WD=Q320229|lt=Emperor Go-Mizunoo}} and daughter of {{ill|Tokugawa Hidetada|en|Tokugawa Hidetada|WD=Q314464|lt=Tokugawa Hidetada}} (+ {{ill|1678|en|1678|WD=Q7634|lt=1678}} ). == Deaths ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|3|10|5|9|4|11|10|1004|qq=}}
